prompt: A surreal, highly detailed sci-fi digital illustration of a white cat with bright yellow eyes sitting on a black and silver robot vacuum cleaner flying through outer space. The cat has a metallic, ribbed cybernetic hose attached to the back of its neck. The robot vacuum is flanked by exactly 2 large, realistic fish acting as rocket boosters, with bright orange flames shooting out of their tails. The background is a vibrant cosmic scene with a starry nebula, streaks of light indicating warp speed, and a fiery exploding planet in the upper left corner. Large vertical Japanese text on the right side reads ネコと和解せよ in yellow and white. At the bottom center, large metallic 3D text reads GERONEKO, with smaller white text below it reading Creator of the planet. Cinematic lighting, hyper-realistic, humorous sci-fi concept art.
